---
title: Home
---

# ML Research Analysis

This website documents out Stat 386 Final Projects

Information about the purpose and findings of the project can be found under the _Report_ tab.

Information about the python package and how to install can be found under the _Tutorial_ tab. 

Other information about the python package and the dataset can be found under the _Documentation_ tab.

A streamlit app to explore the data can be found under the _Streamlit App_ tab. 

Click on _Github_ to see the github repository with the python package.
